# Rank Me Higher

> Rank Me Higher is a Chicago-based digital marketing agency that builds custom-coded websites, runs SEO campaigns, manages Google Maps optimization, creates content and ad campaigns, and automates lead generation with AI. Founded by Andrius, the agency serves local businesses across the United States.

## What We Do

Rank Me Higher helps businesses get found online and convert visitors into customers. We don't use templates — every website is custom-coded for speed, SEO, and conversions. Our AI assistant AVA handles calls, chats, and follow-ups 24/7. We guarantee Google Page 1 rankings or you don't pay.

## Services

### Custom Website Design & Development
- URL: https://rankmehigher.com/services/websites
- Custom-coded websites (no WordPress, no templates)
- Built for speed, mobile-first, and SEO from day one
- AI-powered systems for capturing and closing leads 24/7
- Complete website delivery in 10 business days
- Includes AVA AI assistant for automated calls and chat

### SEO Services
- URL: https://rankmehigher.com/services/seo
- Organic search engine optimization
- Local SEO and Google Maps optimization
- Keyword research and on-page optimization
- Technical SEO audits and fixes
- Monthly reporting and rank tracking
- Guaranteed Page 1 Google rankings

### Local Map Booster
- URL: https://rankmehigher.com/localmapbooster
- Google Maps Top 3 ranking in 7 days or you don't pay
- Google Business Profile optimization
- Review management and generation
- Local citation building
- Map pack dominance strategy

### Content & Ads
- URL: https://rankmehigher.com/services/content-ads
- Professional video content creation (short-form, VSL, YouTube)
- Social media content management
- Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns
- High-ROI ad campaigns that fill your calendar
- Zero-touch content creation

### Outbound Sales
- URL: https://rankmehigher.com/services/outbound
- Database reactivation — we call your old leads
- Cold outreach campaigns
- Appointment setting
- Lead qualification
- Revenue recovery from existing databases

## Key Differentiators

- **Custom Code Only**: No WordPress, no Wix, no templates. Every site is hand-coded for maximum performance.
- **AI-Powered**: Our AI assistant AVA handles phone calls, website chat, and lead follow-up automatically.
- **Guaranteed Results**: Page 1 Google rankings guaranteed, or you don't pay. Google Maps Top 3 in 7 days or free.
- **Fast Delivery**: Complete website and business revamp in 10 business days.
- **Full-Service Agency**: Websites, SEO, ads, content, and outbound — all under one roof.

## Industries We Serve

- Auto detailing and car care
- Trucking and logistics
- HVAC and home services
- Medical and dental practices
- Legal services
- Restaurants and hospitality
- Real estate
- E-commerce
- Construction and trades
- Any local business wanting to dominate Google

## FAQs

**How much does a website cost?**
Pricing varies by project scope. We offer custom packages starting from competitive rates. Contact us for a free consultation.

**How long does it take to build a website?**
We deliver complete websites in 10 business days, including AI automation setup.

**Do you guarantee Google rankings?**
Yes. We guarantee Page 1 Google rankings. If we don't deliver, you don't pay.

**What is Local Map Booster?**
Our Google Maps optimization service that gets your business into the top 3 map results within 7 days, or it's free.

**What is AVA?**
AVA is our AI-powered virtual assistant that handles phone calls, website chat, and lead follow-up for your business 24/7.

**Do you work with businesses outside Chicago?**
Yes, we serve businesses across the entire United States.
